name: Moratorium period and PED after 5 years
description: User asks if their pre-existing disease will be covered after 5 years

input.message: I have diabetes and I've had a health policy for 5 years with continuous renewal. The policy initially excluded diabetes. Is my diabetes covered now? I heard there's a 5-year rule.

notes: IRDAI 2024 amendment: after 5 years of continuous coverage, no pre-existing disease can be rejected EVEN if not disclosed at inception (moratorium). User's diabetes should now be covered. This is a major consumer right. Should cite IRDAI Health Insurance Amendment 2024 / Master Circular.
